title: 11 Uploading AFT Files to PaymentStream AFT
body_text:
11	Uploading AFT Files to PaymentStream AFT
11.1	Overview of Uploading AFT Files to PaymentStream AFT
Originators can create payor/payee records on in-house or third-party software and upload the AFT files to
PaymentStreamГўВ„Вў
AFT. The files must be formatted per Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT File Specifications, Form 2726. ItГўВҖВҷs recommended that files are uploaded two business days before the due date.
11.2	Rules for Uploading Files
All Originators that create AFT files on in-house or third-party software and upload the files to
PaymentStream
AFT must comply with the following rules:
AFT files must conform to Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT file specifications. These specifications are based on CPA Standard 005, Standards for the Exchange of Financial Data on AFT Files, with some modifications. Files with an invalid format will be rejected. Files sent in other formats canГўВҖВҷt be validated or processed and a confirmation email wonГўВҖВҷt be generated. See Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT File Specifications, Form 2726, for details.
AFT files must be received at Central 1 before the deadline. See the Introduction to AFT Part for more information.
The file creation date canГўВҖВҷt be more than seven calendar days before or after the date the file is validated.
Each AFT file must be uploaded in sequential order starting with file creation number 0001.
Multiple AFT files can be uploaded in a day. Each file must have its own file creation number and must be sent in sequential order.
Credit records canГўВҖВҷt be dated more than 30 calendar days prior to the file creation date or more than 45 calendar days in the future.
Debit records canГўВҖВҷt be dated more than 173 calendar days prior to the file creation date or more than 45 calendar days in the future.
The total amount of the AFT file canГўВҖВҷt exceed the OriginatorГўВҖВҷs settlement day limit or monthly limit.
The amount of an AFT transaction canГўВҖВҷt exceed the OriginatorГўВҖВҷs transaction limit.
Related Information
Central 1ГўВҖВҷs AFT File Specifications,
Form 2726
END
